2007 video game

2007 video game

| SWAT Elite Troops | |

***SWAT Elite Troops*** is the second game of the *[Police Quest](/wiki/Police_Quest "Police Quest")* series to be released for [mobile devices](/wiki/Mobile_game "Mobile game"). It was released in December 2007.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)

December 6, 2007. Retrieved August 6, 2024.

3. **[^](#cite_ref-3)** ["SWAT Elite Troops"](https://www.pocketgamer.com/swat-elite-troops/swat-elite-troops/). *www.pocketgamer.com*. 7 December 2007. Retrieved 2022-08-23.
